AircraftTrackingData.description:
Raw aircraft tracking data from ADS-B Exchange API.
Contains real-time telemetry, position, and status information for tracked aircraft.

aircraft_type.description: Aircraft ICAO type code pulled from database (as defined by ICAO DOC8643)

alt_baro.description: Aircraft barometric altitude in feet. When alt_baro_is_ground is true, aircraft is on ground.

alt_baro_is_ground.description: Indicates if aircraft is on ground (alt_baro would be "ground" in raw API)

alt_geom.description: Geometric (GNSS / INS) altitude in feet referenced to the WGS84 ellipsoid

baro_rate.description: Rate of change of barometric altitude, feet/minute

category.description: Emitter category to identify particular aircraft or vehicle classes (values A0-D7)

dbFlags.description: Bitfield for database flags: military = dbFlags & 1, interesting = dbFlags & 2, PIA = dbFlags & 4, LADD = dbFlags & 8

emergency.description: ADS-B emergency/priority status, superset of 7x00 squawks. Values: none, general, lifeguard, minfuel, nordo, unlawful, downed, reserved

flight.description: Callsign, the flight name or aircraft registration as 8 chars

geom_rate.description: Rate of change of geometric (GNSS / INS) altitude, feet/minute

hex.description: The 24-bit ICAO identifier of the aircraft, as 6 hex digits. May start with '~' for non-ICAO addresses (e.g. from TIS-B).

lat.description: Aircraft latitude position in decimal degrees

lon.description: Aircraft longitude position in decimal degrees

messages.description: Total number of Mode S messages received from this aircraft

mlat.description: List of fields derived from MLAT data

nav_altitude_mcp.description: Selected altitude from the Mode Control Panel / Flight Control Unit (MCP/FCU), feet

nav_heading.description: Selected heading (True or Magnetic is not defined in DO-260B, mostly Magnetic)

nic.description: Navigation Integrity Category - measure of position accuracy

nic_baro.description: Navigation Integrity Category for Barometric Altitude

rc.description: Radius of Containment in meters; measure of position integrity derived from NIC & supplementary bits

rssi.description: Recent average RSSI (signal power) in dBFS; always negative

seen.description: How long ago (in seconds before "now") a message was last received from this aircraft

seen_pos.description: How long ago (in seconds before "now") the position was last updated

sil_type.description: Source Integrity Level type: unknown, perhour, persample

spi.description: Flight status special position identification bit

squawk.description: Mode A code (Squawk), encoded as 4 octal digits

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this data was captured

tisb.description: List of fields derived from TIS-B data

track.description: True track over ground in degrees (0-359)

transponder_type.description: Type of underlying messages / best source of current data. Values: adsb_icao, adsb_icao_nt, adsr_icao, tisb_icao, adsc, mlat, other, mode_s, adsb_other, adsr_other, tisb_other, tisb_trackfile

columns.comment: How long ago (in seconds before "now") the position was last updated
columns.name: seen_pos

columns.comment: ADS-B Version Number: 0, 1, 2 (3-7 are reserved)
columns.name: version

columns.comment: Navigation Integrity Category for Barometric Altitude
columns.name: nic_baro

columns.comment: Navigation Accuracy for Position
columns.name: nac_p

columns.comment: Navigation Accuracy for Velocity
columns.name: nac_v

columns.comment: Source Integrity Level
columns.name: sil

columns.comment: Source Integrity Level type: unknown, perhour, persample
columns.name: sil_type

columns.comment: Geometric Vertical Accuracy
columns.name: gva

columns.comment: System Design Assurance
columns.name: sda

columns.comment: Flight status alert bit
columns.name: alert

columns.comment: Flight status special position identification bit
columns.name: spi

columns.comment: List of fields derived from MLAT data
columns.name: mlat

columns.comment: List of fields derived from TIS-B data
columns.name: tisb

columns.comment: Total number of Mode S messages received from this aircraft
columns.name: messages

columns.comment: How long ago (in seconds before "now") a message was last received from this aircraft
columns.name: seen

columns.comment: Recent average RSSI (signal power) in dBFS; always negative
columns.name: rssi

columns.comment: Timestamp when this data was captured
columns.name: timestamp

columns.comment: Z-order curve coordinate for efficient spatial queries
columns.name: zorderCoordinate

columns.comment: Approach mode engaged (decoded from nav_modes)
columns.name: approach

columns.comment: Autopilot mode engaged (decoded from nav_modes)
columns.name: autopilot

columns.comment: Altitude hold mode engaged (decoded from nav_modes)
columns.name: althold

columns.comment: Lateral navigation mode engaged (decoded from nav_modes)
columns.name: lnav

columns.comment: Traffic Collision Avoidance System mode engaged (decoded from nav_modes)
columns.name: tcas

columns.comment: The 24-bit ICAO identifier of the aircraft, as 6 hex digits. May start with '~' for non-ICAO addresses (e.g. from TIS-B).
columns.name: hex

columns.comment: Type of underlying messages / best source of current data. Values: adsb_icao, adsb_icao_nt, adsr_icao, tisb_icao, adsc, mlat, other, mode_s, adsb_other, adsr_other, tisb_other, tisb_trackfile
columns.name: transponder_type

columns.comment: Callsign, the flight name or aircraft registration as 8 chars
columns.name: flight

columns.comment: Aircraft registration pulled from database
columns.name: r

columns.comment: Aircraft ICAO type code pulled from database (as defined by ICAO DOC8643)
columns.name: aircraft_type

columns.comment: Bitfield for database flags: military = dbFlags & 1, interesting = dbFlags & 2, PIA = dbFlags & 4, LADD = dbFlags & 8
columns.name: dbFlags

columns.comment: Aircraft latitude position in decimal degrees
columns.name: lat

columns.comment: Aircraft longitude position in decimal degrees
columns.name: lon

columns.comment: Aircraft barometric altitude in feet. When alt_baro_is_ground is true, aircraft is on ground.
columns.name: alt_baro

columns.comment: Indicates if aircraft is on ground (alt_baro would be "ground" in raw API)
columns.name: alt_baro_is_ground

columns.comment: Geometric (GNSS / INS) altitude in feet referenced to the WGS84 ellipsoid
columns.name: alt_geom

columns.comment: Ground speed in knots
columns.name: gs

columns.comment: True track over ground in degrees (0-359)
columns.name: track

columns.comment: Rate of change of barometric altitude, feet/minute
columns.name: baro_rate

columns.comment: Rate of change of geometric (GNSS / INS) altitude, feet/minute
columns.name: geom_rate

columns.comment: Mode A code (Squawk), encoded as 4 octal digits
columns.name: squawk

columns.comment: ADS-B emergency/priority status, superset of 7x00 squawks. Values: none, general, lifeguard, minfuel, nordo, unlawful, downed, reserved
columns.name: emergency

columns.comment: Emitter category to identify particular aircraft or vehicle classes (values A0-D7)
columns.name: category

columns.comment: Altimeter setting (QFE or QNH/QNE), hPa
columns.name: nav_qnh

columns.comment: Selected altitude from the Mode Control Panel / Flight Control Unit (MCP/FCU), feet
columns.name: nav_altitude_mcp

columns.comment: Selected heading (True or Magnetic is not defined in DO-260B, mostly Magnetic)
columns.name: nav_heading

columns.comment: Set of engaged automation modes: 'autopilot', 'vnav', 'althold', 'approach', 'lnav', 'tcas'
columns.name: nav_modes

columns.comment: Navigation Integrity Category - measure of position accuracy
columns.name: nic

columns.comment: Radius of Containment in meters; measure of position integrity derived from NIC & supplementary bits
columns.name: rc

columns.comment: How long ago (in seconds before "now") the position was last updated
columns.name: seen_pos

columns.comment: ADS-B Version Number: 0, 1, 2 (3-7 are reserved)
columns.name: version

columns.comment: Navigation Integrity Category for Barometric Altitude
columns.name: nic_baro

columns.comment: Navigation Accuracy for Position
columns.name: nac_p

columns.comment: Navigation Accuracy for Velocity
columns.name: nac_v

columns.comment: Source Integrity Level
columns.name: sil

columns.comment: Source Integrity Level type: unknown, perhour, persample
columns.name: sil_type

columns.comment: Geometric Vertical Accuracy
columns.name: gva

columns.comment: System Design Assurance
columns.name: sda

columns.comment: Flight status alert bit
columns.name: alert

columns.comment: Flight status special position identification bit
columns.name: spi

columns.comment: List of fields derived from MLAT data
columns.name: mlat

columns.comment: List of fields derived from TIS-B data
columns.name: tisb

columns.comment: Total number of Mode S messages received from this aircraft
columns.name: messages

columns.comment: How long ago (in seconds before "now") a message was last received from this aircraft
columns.name: seen

columns.comment: Recent average RSSI (signal power) in dBFS; always negative
columns.name: rssi

columns.comment: Timestamp when this data was captured
columns.name: timestamp
